reason: Cannot preserve oracle: nop=1 gold=1 after rewrite. The upstream regression tests (cache with preserveSelectedRowKeys, works with receive selectedRowKeys from [] to undefined) pass on the base buggy code because they do not test the specific crash scenario (preserveSelectedRowKeys:true + selectedRowKeys undefined transition). Behavioral tests that run these upstream tests cannot distinguish buggy from fixed code. The text assertion in the original test was the only discriminator, and removing it makes the behavioral tests pass on both.
